{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Legion Shepherd
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Legion Shepherd]] knows [[Sola]] has arrived.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
